title: vicia tenuifolia subsp. boissieri
intro: Vicia tenuifolia subsp. boissieri, commonly known as the slender vetch or Boissier's vetch, is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vicia tenuifolia subsp. boissieri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis and kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Vicia tenuifolia subsp. boissieri can be consumed as a tea or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
